AI.rationale: NVDA Q1 FY26 $44.1B (+69% YoY), Q2 guide $45B with H20 $8B headwind baked in; MSFT Q3 FY25 Azure +33%, Cloud $42.4B; GOOGL Gemini 2.5 Flash/Pro GA on Vertex AI June 2025; AlphaEvolve+Willow research breakthrough.

rockets_spacecraft.rationale: RKLB Q1 $123M (+32% YoY), 5 Electron launches, Q2 guide $130-140M. Air Force Neutron contract signed (NET 2026). EBITDA still negative -$30M/qtr; Neutron pre-flight.

robotics.rationale: Figure 02 completed 20-hour BMW Spartanburg shift May 2025; Tesla Optimus production scaled back due to hand design; humanoids in pilot phase, not mass production.

engineered_biology.rationale: CRSP CTX310 Phase 1 ANGPTL3 results (May 7) -82% triglycerides / -81% LDL; Prime Medicine first-ever prime-editing clinical data (May 19); FDA bespoke pathway draft guidance. Pre-revenue at scale.

quantum.rationale: McKinsey June 2025 Quantum Monitor projects $100B market within decade; MSFT Majorana 1 (Feb); IBM Starling 2029 roadmap. QTUM strong returns reflect re-rating, not commercial revenue.

nuclear_fusion.rationale: Meta-Constellation 20-year 1,121 MW PPA at Clinton (June 3 2025) — landmark corporate nuclear demand. DOE opened Milestone fusion pilot program to new companies (June 12). NUKZ holdings predominantly fission utilities.

general_markets.rationale: Fed held 4.25-4.50% June 18 with 2 cuts projected H2 2025; gold $3,284 end-June (~26% YTD); central banks bought 415 tonnes H1 2025; AGG ~5% TTM.
